settings.text:
Christmas Opening Hours

Pre-Christmas Delivery
Place your order by Monday, 15 December 2025 for the best chance of pre-Christmas delivery.
We will continue sending orders up to 23 December, but placing your order early helps avoid seasonal delays.

Our Stores Opening Hours
24 December – Open until 1pm
25–28 December – Closed
29–30 December – Open as normal
31 December – Open until 1pm
1 January – Closed
From 2 January – Open as normal

Headquarters Opening Hours
Headquarters will be closed from 24 December to 2 January.

--------------

Homecare Medical has 9 stores across Ireland, including Dublin, Galway, Ballyhaunis, Castlebar, Ennis, Tralee, Waterford, Athlone and Dundalk. Find out the information for each of our stores below.

We’re here to assist with any inquiries or product-related questions. Whether you need advice on choosing the right products for your needs or have any other queries, don’t hesitate to visit us in any of our stores or get in touch with our dedicated team.

  • LoCall: 0818 911 555
  • Phone: +353 (094) 9633 800
  • Email: info@homecaremedical.ie

Our team is happy to help and provide expert advice on all our products.
